derivation: both signatures cover SHA-256(JCS(receipt_core)) with sig values stripped before canonicalisation
digest_pinning_convention: negative vectors pin the actual divergent digest (expected_divergent_digest), not just inequality, per the cross-axis convention on #2398

artefacts.receipt_sample_signed.json: A complete signed hybrid-pqc receipt (ES256K + ML-DSA-65)
artefacts.jwks_snapshot.json: Pinned key snapshot; verifier also accepts the live JWKS URL
artefacts.action_ref_preimage.json: Work-layer preimage for the action_ref binding check
